Request a demo

Architecture & Security

Built secure. Built to comply.

SYAG is designed with security at every layer — from how your data is stored to how your users authenticate to how your facility's information is isolated from every other tenant on the platform.

Hosted on Microsoft Azure

SYAG runs on Microsoft Azure infrastructure, providing enterprise-grade reliability, global availability, and regional data residency options critical for MEA compliance requirements.

  • Hosting: Azure App Service (managed, auto-scaling)
  • Database: Azure-hosted PostgreSQL with automated backups
  • CDN & WAF: Azure Front Door with Web Application Firewall
  • Messaging: Azure Service Bus for reliable event delivery
  • IoT: Azure IoT Hub (S1 Standard) for device connectivity
  • Uptime SLA: 99.9% availability

Your data stays yours — always

Schema-per-tenant architecture

Every facility on SYAG gets its own isolated PostgreSQL schema. This means your guard records, incident logs, visitor data, and asset registry are stored in a completely separate namespace from every other customer. No shared tables. No cross-tenant data access. No risk of data leakage between facilities.

What this means in practice

  • Your facility admin cannot see another facility's data
  • Even if two facilities are in the same city, their data never intersects
  • You can request a full export of your data at any time

Role-based access. Zero-trust by design.

SYAG uses OpenIddict as its identity provider, implementing industry-standard OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect flows:

User type Auth flow Session
Web admin / supervisor Authorization Code + PKCE Short-lived JWT + refresh token
Guard (mobile app) Device Code flow Refresh token rotation
API integrations Client Credentials Scoped access tokens

Role hierarchy

  • Guard — field operations only (patrol, incidents, visitor scan)
  • Supervisor — site-level management + guard oversight
  • Admin — full facility configuration + user management
  • Ops Center — cross-site read access for monitoring

Every action is logged with user identity, timestamp, and IP address. Full audit trail, always.

Encrypted in transit. Protected at rest.

  • All data transmitted over TLS 1.3
  • Database encrypted at rest (AES-256)
  • Redis cache data encrypted
  • Azure Service Bus messages encrypted in transit
  • Passwords hashed using bcrypt with salt

Compliance-ready for the MEA region

Saudi NCA compliance path

For customers requiring alignment with Saudi Arabia's National Cybersecurity Authority (NCA) Essential Cybersecurity Controls, SYAG offers an upgrade path to Azure Front Door Premium with enhanced WAF rules, DDoS protection, and private link connectivity.

UAE IA compliance path

For UAE customers under the Information Assurance (IA) framework, SYAG can configure data residency within UAE North Azure region, providing geographic data sovereignty.

What we're working on

  • ISO 27001 certification (roadmap)
  • SOC 2 Type II (roadmap)
  • Penetration test reports (available to enterprise customers under NDA)

Have compliance requirements? Talk to our team.

We'll walk you through the architecture.
